song.title: How Can I Keep From Singing
song.author: Chris Tomlin
song.copyright: 2006 worshiptogether.com songs (Admin. by EMI Christian Music Publishing)
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . F C Dm Bb There is an endless song, echoes in my soul, I hear the music ring . F C And though the storms may come, I am holding on, .Dm Bb To the Rock I cling
[C] .F C How can I keep from singing Your praise . Bb F/A Bb C How can I ever say enough, how amazing is Your love .F C How can I keep from shouting Your Name . Bb F Bb C F I know I am loved by the King, and it makes my heart want to sing
[V2]
I will lift my eyes in the darkest night, for I know my Savior lives And I will walk with You, knowing You'll see me through And sing the songs You give
[B] . Gm F/A Bb C I can sing in the troubled times, sing when I win . Gm F/A Bb C I can sing when I lose my step and I fall down again . Gm F/A Bb C I can sing 'cause You pick me up, sing 'cause You're there|| . Gm F/A Bb C I can sing 'cause You hear me, Lord, when I call to You in prayer . Gm F/A Bb C I can sing with my last breath, sing for I know . Gm F/A Bb C That I'll sing with the angels and the saints around the throne
